name: validate_ixc_design
full_help:
validate_ixc_design

Description: 
Validate IXC design

Syntax: 
validate_ixc_design  [-check_phy_connectivity] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                       Description
  --------------------------------------
  [-check_phy_connectivity]  Checks all used hardware level connections for 
                             MIG IPs
  [-quiet]                   Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                 Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Memory

arguments.description: Checks all used hardware level connections for MIG IPs
Suspend message limits during command execution
